raw: 1 Science Park Boston, MA 02134 617-723-2500 Get Directions Updated 10/29/25 Reserve pass for a specific day at the library. Download to phone or print pass. Up to 4 people are admitted at a 50% discount off of Exhibit Hall admission prices only with each pass, and children under 3 are always free. Take pass to the Box Office to Exchange for discounted Exhibit Hall tickets. Your pass can only be used on the date printed on the confirmation. Visit museum website for more information.
